kilosort_clusters.name: kilosort_directory
kilosort_clusters.documentation: The relative path (within the ndi.session) to the kilosort output directory that was imported.

kilosort_clusters.name: curated_output_MD5_checksum
kilosort_clusters.documentation: The MD5 checksum of the curated spike_clusters.npy file. Used to detect whether the curation has changed since a previous import.
